property.name: ranger_usersync_logback_maxfilesize
property.description: The maximum size of backup file before the log is rotated
property.display-name: Ranger usersync Log: backup file size

property.name: ranger_usersync_logback_maxbackupindex
property.display-name: Ranger usersync Log: # of backup files

property.name: content
property.description: This is the jinja template for ranger usersync logback.xml file
property.value: <configuration> <appender name="logFile" class="ch.qos.logback.core.rolling.RollingFileAppender"> <file>{{usersync_log_dir}}/usersync-${hostname}-${user}.log</file> <encoder> <pattern>%d{dd MMM yyyy HH:mm:ss} %5p %c{1} [%t] - %m%n</pattern> </encoder> <rollingPolicy class="ch.qos.logback.core.rolling.SizeAndTimeBasedRollingPolicy"> <fileNamePattern>{{usersync_log_dir}}/usersync-${hostname}-${user}.log.%d{yyyy-MM-dd}.%i.gz</fileNamePattern> <maxFileSize>{{ ranger_usersync_logback_maxfilesize }}</maxFileSize> <maxHistory>{{ ranger_usersync_logback_maxbackupindex }}</maxHistory> <cleanHistoryOnStart>true</cleanHistoryOnStart> </rollingPolicy> </appender> <root level="info"> <appender-ref ref="logFile"/> </root> </configuration>
